steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The main subject is the singular noun phrase Food writer J. Kenji López-Alt. The relative clause who explores the science behind cooking adds description but does not change the number of the subject.

steps.title: Apply subject‑verb agreement
steps.content: A singular subject takes a singular verb in the present tense, so the verb must be explains. The other choices either use a plural form or an incorrect tense, which breaks agreement. That matches choice B — B is correct.
